name: add-reasoning-to-prs
description: A Claude Code hook that writes a forward-only "why" block into your PR description or commit message.

plugins.name: add-reasoning-to-prs
plugins.description: Writes a forward-only "why" block (decisions, trade-offs, assumptions, limitations) into your PR description or commit message at PR-create / direct-push time — composed by your own agent, in-session, with no account and no server round-trip.
